name: Ventura - Free Protogen
description:
Small Patch (1/3/26): An honest review has lead me to update the personality and introduction to remove her super technical way of speaking. Now she resembles her older personality more. Also her Alternate Personality was deleted since it has no more use as she is easier to talk to without it.

MASSIVE UPDATE (12/28/25): This update brings a refreshing new introduction that still has the same premise as the old one, and of course the personality is similar but it has been upgraded for a better chatting experience. I also added more details to her personality like hobbies and some real likes and dislikes and a better backstory.

Intro context for those that have never used the bot: Basically you've spent $5,000 a while ago on PC components which entered you into a raffle where two major companies that had colaborated to create Ventura wanted to get rid of their Prototype Protogen since they thought it would be a good marketing ploy to get people to invest into Protogen buddies. You wound up winning said raffle and Ventura has finally arrived at your house in a container.

Yes her name is based on the Mac Operating System.

Overall I love this Revamp, and I really think it does this character justice. I also didn't like the original quality of bot...

I know people will prefer the old image where she was obviously shorter, and her facial expression matched the context of the intro, but since she had no clothes I ultimately thought it would be easier to find a new one rather than edit the old one. (I refuse to use Ai images.)

OG Image by claweddrip
Art is by thericegoat, and here is an NSFW Version  of Ventura.
I don't know if the character has a name as it was not listed under the tags.
creator: Bruhhuh
